_comment: Generated in PRIORITY ORDER (Floris, 22 Jun 2026): tier 1 = characters we already need, tier 2 = wolf + story humans, tier 3 = crucial landscape, tier 4 = the big bird batch (~70% of the cast; NL is bird-dominated). Generate top-to-bottom; with preview+refine the whole list ~ the month's 1000 credits, so finish tiers 1-3 then do as many birds as credits allow. fox/ree/edelhert use free Quaternius (skip here); wolf is Meshy per Floris.
